content.text: I'll check the current state of the repository.

content.content:
diff --git a/project/ax45mpv/gdb-ice-riscv64.exp b/project/ax45mpv/gdb-ice-riscv64.exp
index 9acbe9cb..f4e76f79 100755
--- a/project/ax45mpv/gdb-ice-riscv64.exp
+++ b/project/ax45mpv/gdb-ice-riscv64.exp
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ set timeout 600
 # Setup the nds32 gdb full-path so that we can execute it to connect to aice.
 # This value should be replaced by build system or manually changed.
 #   e.g. "set gdb /path/to/nds32le-elf-newlib-v3/bin/nds32le-elf-gdb"
-set gdb riscv64-elf-gdb
+set gdb riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython
 
 # Setup the host machine that iceman is running on.
 # This value should be replaced by build system or manually changed.
diff --git a/project/ax45mpv/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board b/project/ax45mpv/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board
index f7c1409b..f2a56f75 100755
--- a/project/ax45mpv/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board
+++ b/project/ax45mpv/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board
@@ -53,7 +53,7 @@ GCC="no"
 CACHE="on"
 
 # set the board need reset-and-run or not.
-RESET_BOARD="on"
+RESET_BOARD="off"
 
 # setup the PMA for HVM (it could be "on" or "off")
 HVM_PMA="off"
@@ -69,7 +69,7 @@ DC_WA_THRESHOLD="1"
 
 # we should reset the board when we run first test case in every testsuite.
 if [ ! -f "$SIMULATOR_DIR/First_Reset_done" ]; then
-    RESET="on"
+    RESET="off"
     touch $SIMULATOR_DIR/First_Reset_done
 else
     RESET=$RESET_BOARD

content.text:
Here are the changes I see:

**Modified files:**
- `project/ax45mpv/gdb-ice-riscv64.exp` — changed gdb binary to `riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython`
- `project/ax45mpv/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board` — disabled board reset (`RESET_BOARD` and `RESET` set to "off")

**Untracked files:**
- `CLAUDE.md`
- `build_perf_ax45mpv/`
- `diff_log`
- `project/ax45mpv/First_Reset_done`
- `release/`

Which files would you like to include in the commit? The untracked files look like they may be build artifacts (`build_perf_ax45mpv/`, `diff_log`, `First_Reset_done`, `release/`) — should I commit just the two modified files, or include some of the untracked ones as well?

input.command:
git add project/ax45mpv/gdb-ice-riscv64.exp project/ax45mpv/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
[misc] Update ax45mpv board config to use nopython gdb and disable board reset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git status
input.description: Stage and commit the two modified files
